commands.result: Confirmed local DB tables include records, corridors, routes, identity_aliases, do_not_merge, evidence_refs, and blocks_fts.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select record_kind, count(*) from records where record_kind in ('corridor','route') group by record_kind; select kind, count(*) from identity_aliases where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind; select kind, count(*) from do_not_merge where kind in ('corridor','route') group by kind;"
commands.result: Found 280 corridor records, 427 route records, 36 corridor aliases, 39 route aliases, 5 corridor do-not-merge rows, and 34 route do-not-merge rows.
Prior Codex prep files through identity090 had corridor/route proposals only for the eight batch090 corridor pairs; none of the batch093 aliases appeared.

commands.cmd: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (...) select p.kind,p.alias,p.target, a.target as existing_alias_target, dn.reason as db_do_not_merge_reason, ra.record_kind as alias_kind, rt.record_kind as target_kind from pairs p left join identity_aliases a on a.kind=p.kind and a.alias=p.alias left join do_not_merge dn on dn.kind=p.kind and ((dn.record_id_a=p.alias and dn.record_id_b=p.target) or (dn.record_id_a=p.target and dn.record_id_b=p.alias)) left join records ra on ra.record_id=p.alias left join records rt on rt.record_id=p.target;"
commands.result: For all 8 proposed pairs, alias and target materialize as the same allowed kind; existing_alias_target and db_do_not_merge_reason were empty.

commands.cmd: jq -r '.aliases.corridor // {}, .aliases.route // {} | to_entries[] | .key + "\t" + (.value|tostring)' data/identity-overrides/merges.json | rg '<batch093 aliases>' || true
commands.result: No batch093 alias_id already appears in data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
No batch093 alias_id or target_id appeared in prior Codex identity prep proposals through identity090.
